notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman José Ramírez. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Taylor Ward to 2nd. Gunnar Henderson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman José Ramírez.
